title: Shake It Out
why_this_song: Shake It Out by Florence + the Machine (2011) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.
teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: Shake it out, shake it out
Shake it out, shake it out, ooh whoa oh
Shake it out, shake it out
Shake it out, shake it out, oh whoa oh
And I'm damned if I do, and I'm damned if I don't
So here's to drinks in the dark, at the end of my road

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "shake" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "shake" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "it's" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "it's" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: But it's always darkest before the dawn

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Here to relive your darkest moments
'Cause I like to keep my issues drawn

exercises.prompt_en: If you could change the ending of the story told in "Shake It Out", what would happen instead?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse mudar o final da história contada em "Shake It Out", o que aconteceria?

exercises.prompt_en: Describe the mood of "Shake It Out" in three adjectives. What part of the song makes you feel that way?
exercises.prompt_pt: Descreva o clima de "Shake It Out" em três adjetivos. Que parte da música te faz sentir isso?

exercises.prompt_en: Who in your life would you dedicate "Shake It Out" to, and what line captures what you want to say to them?
exercises.prompt_pt: Para quem da sua vida você dedicaria "Shake It Out", e qual verso resume o que você quer dizer para essa pessoa?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
